decisions.title: Deprecate Window Functions in favor of Family Stats
decisions.context: ENG-8990 removes Window Functions while ENG-7954, 7856-7858 build out Family Stats. This is a significant API/UX shift that affects Explore V2. Need to confirm migration path for existing users and whether this aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar.

arguments.for: Family Stats provide more flexible, reusable analytics primitives that better capture Signal>Evidence patterns. Simplifies query engine.
arguments.against: Breaking change for existing users. Migration effort required. Need to ensure Family Stats cover all Window Function use cases before removal.

decisions.title: Prioritize QueryEngine performance vs Canvas feature expansion
decisions.context: QueryEngine improvements (ENG-8905, 9040, 9041) focus on sampling and streaming, while Canvas adds params (ENG-8755). GetAnnotations latency issues (ENG-8873) suggest infrastructure strain. Need to decide: performance sprint or continue balanced feature development?

arguments.for: Performance directly impacts North Star (decisions/customer). Slow queries block evidence gathering. On-change sampling and streaming are foundational for scale.
arguments.against: Canvas params enable deeper embedding (pillar 2). Customers waiting for feature parity. Can parallelize teams.

decisions.title: Commit to Cross-browser/OS support scope for Explore V2 GA
decisions.context: ENG-8943 adds Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Linux testing. This expands QA surface significantly. Need to define: is this blocking for 'Nail the Core' or can we ship with Chrome/Windows only initially?

arguments.for: Enterprise customers demand broad compatibility. Firefox/Safari bugs create support burden. Better to validate before GA.
arguments.against: Delays GA release. Chrome represents 70%+ usage. Can add browser support iteratively post-launch.

decisions.title: Resolve E2 data accuracy issues before promoting beyond beta
decisions.context: Multiple data integrity bugs: ENG-7356 (incorrect table values), ENG-8946 (config persistence), ENG-8819 (fresh/historical merge), ENG-7348 (v1/v2 channel handling). E2 is core to Explore V2 value prop.
decisions.blockedBy: Need to triage severity - are these edge cases or systemic? Requires data audit (ENG-9025) results.

arguments.for: Data accuracy is non-negotiable for Signal>Evidence>Decision. One bad decision based on wrong data destroys trust. Block promotion until clean.
arguments.against: May be edge cases affecting <5% of queries. Can document known issues while fixing. Blocking slows momentum.

decisions.title: Define Python Rules execution environment strategy (local k8s vs cloud)
decisions.context: ENG-7808 explores local k8s for python execution. This affects Sift Edge positioning and 'Build the Moat' pillar. Need architecture decision: where does rule execution happen at scale?

arguments.for: Local k8s enables edge deployment, reduces latency for time-sensitive rules, supports air-gapped customers (moat builder).
arguments.against: Increases operational complexity. Cloud execution easier to monitor, scale, update. May be premature optimization.

timeAudit.weekSummary: 62% of week in meetings. Only 20% unscheduled time for decision-making and deep work. One-on-ones consuming significant time (38% of meetings).
alerts: Critical: 5 open decisions with deadlines in next 2 weeks but no scheduled decision-making sessions on calendar
Pattern: E2 bugs appearing across multiple tickets - suggests need for focused bug bash, not incremental fixes
Opportunity: QueryEngine work (ENG-8905, 9040, 9041) could be consolidated into single performance sprint to reduce context switching

events.title: E2 Data Accuracy Decision Gate
events.description: Go/no-go on promoting E2 beyond beta. Requires data audit results and severity assessment of 4 open bugs.

events.title: QueryEngine vs Canvas Prioritization Decision
events.description: Decide resource allocation: performance sprint or balanced development. Impacts Q2 roadmap.

events.title: Cross-browser Support Scope Review
events.description: Define browser/OS matrix for Explore V2 GA. Chrome-only vs full matrix decision.

events.title: Window Functions Deprecation Alignment
events.description: Finalize migration path for existing Window Function users to Family Stats. Includes comms plan.

events.title: Family Stats Public Launch
events.description: Family Stats go live. Enables sigma, mean, percentile calculations across run families. Key differentiator vs competitors.

events.title: Python Rules Architecture Decision
events.description: Finalize execution environment strategy: local k8s, cloud, or hybrid. Impacts Sift Edge roadmap.

events.title: GetAnnotations Performance Review
events.description: Review ENG-8873 latency investigation. May require query optimization or caching strategy.

events.title: Canvas Params Beta Release
events.description: ENG-8755 ships. Enables parameterized dashboards. Key ask from embed-deeper customers.

events.title: Q1 North Star Metrics Review
events.description: Review Decisions Captured Per Customer trend. Current: 47 (+12%). Target: 52 by EoQ.

events.title: Explore V2 GA Readiness Assessment
events.description: Final go/no-go for Q2 GA launch. Requires E2 data accuracy resolution, cross-browser decision implementation, and query performance hitting <2s P95.
